Partial Thromboplastin Time (PTT) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/partial-thromboplastin-time-ptt-test/ 
Partial Thromboplastin Time (PTT) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a PTT (partial thromboplastin time) test? 
A partial thromboplastin time (PTT) test uses a blood sample to measure how long it takes for your blood to make a clot . Normally, when you get a cut or injury that causes bleeding, many different types of proteins in your blood work together to make
